steps.t: The Wild Ruins lie to the south of Ost Galadh. Fuirgam has asked you to keep an eye out for enemies out of Dol Guldur or anything else out of the ordi…
Fuirgam is at Ost Galadh, north of the Wild Ruins. You should report back to Fuirgam with the results of your exploration. In particular, he may be in…
